subject: [PATCH v2] btrfs: abort transaction in do_remap_reloc_trans() on failure

reviews.author: Johannes Thumshirn
reviews.summary: Approved the patch with a Reviewed-by tag, indicating it looks good to them.

2026-04-13.patch_summary: This patch addresses a potential issue in the btrfs relocation code by aborting the transaction if any of the calls made by do_remap_reloc_trans() fail, preventing inconsistent states from reaching the disk.
